task_completion.description: Ground station 'MRCC_Malta' is created with the specified coordinates and parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'New Ground Station' dialog in GPredict. Verify the Name is 'MRCC_Malta', Latitude is 35.9375, Longitude is 14.3978, Altitude is 50, and Minimum Elevation is 5.

task_completion.description: The four required satellites are added to the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Module properties' dialog in GPredict. Verify that NOAA 15, NOAA 18, NOAA 19, and SUOMI NPP are present in the list of selected satellites.
Look for the 'Module properties' dialog with the Name field set to 'SAR_Wall_Display', or a tab in the main GPredict window named 'SAR_Wall_Display'.

task_completion.description: The module is assigned to the 'MRCC_Malta' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Module properties' dialog and verify the 'Ground Station' dropdown is set to 'MRCC_Malta'.

task_completion.description: The module layout is set to 'Map Only'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Module properties' dialog and verify the Layout is set to a Map-only view, or observe the main GPredict window showing only a map for the SAR_Wall_Display tab.

task_completion.description: 'Ground Tracks' are enabled for the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the map view in GPredict showing lines indicating the future ground tracks of the satellites, or a map settings dropdown where 'Ground Track' is enabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GPredict menus and dialogs, rather than executing terminal commands to modify configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not open GPredict configuration files (e.g., in ~/.config/Gpredict/) using a text editor like nano or vim to insert the values.

integrity.description: The results appear in the genuine GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard GPredict application window, maps, and UI elements, not a mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The 5-degree minimum elevation is standard for Malta to mitigate coastal RF interference. The correct NORAD IDs for the required satellites are NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), and SUOMI NPP (37849).
